title: thisisait/nOS
summary: An opensource agentic system infrastructure - not an OS

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with Qwen 3.6). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: codelined-ag/Extracto
summary: Your private document brain. PDFs in, RAG out. Self-hosted. Plug everywhere.

title: phoson-lat/phoson-engine-minimal
summary: Minimal Python runtime for the Phoson autonomous-agent platform

title: kurok/pyimgtag
summary: Tag images with AI using a local Gemma model (via Ollama) — EXIF GPS reverse geocoding, Apple Photos write-back on macOS, no cloud, fully on-device

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: MCP bridge between Claude Code and your IDE (170+ tools — LSP, debugger, terminal, git). Optional Patchwork OS layer adds recipes, approval queue, and oversight dashboard.

title: nerett/llm-login
summary: Reverse proxy for local LLMs with user management and token quota

title: taahamahdi/i18n-ai-translate
summary: Use ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, or Claude to translate your i18n JSON to any language

title: AlexHettle/MeadowPy
summary: Beginner-friendly Python IDE with local AI features, teaching tools, plain-English error help, and step-through debugging.

title: guillecanizal/trips-workspace
summary: Local-first travel planning workspace with an AI copilot. Plan trips day by day — hotels, activities, costs — with a LangChain agent and MCP server for agentic access via Claude Code.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: wsj-br/transrewrt
summary: AI-powered text tool: translate between languages, rewrite in different styles, and transform with custom prompts. Supports OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, xAI, Ollama, and more. Runs as an Electron app (Windows/Linux) or a self-hosted Docker web app (amd64/arm64).

title: anthonybaldwin/UsageButtons
summary: Stream Deck plugin — live AI-coding-assistant usage stats for Claude, Codex, Gemini, Vertex AI, Cursor, and more.

title: cogwheel0/conduit
summary: Mobile (iOS/Android) client for OpenWebUI. Chat with your self‑hosted AI.

title: drbiobit/Cortex
summary: Production-ready AI interface with Project Memory and multi-user support for Ollama and OpenRouter.

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
summary: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

title: buddyholly007/syntaur
summary: Your personal AI platform — one binary, 88 tools, voice assistant, smart home, private by default. Written in Rust.

title: k-zehnder/gophersignal
summary: Gopher Signal uses smart technology to quickly summarize important points from HackerNews.com articles. https://gophersignal.com

title: Shelpuk-AI-Technology-Consulting/kitty-bridge
summary: Universal LLM bridge for AI agents. Use Claude Code with MiniMax, Codex with GLM, or Gemini CLI with OpenRouter — one command, any provider. Works with coding agents, OpenClaw, Hermes, and others.
